name: Tiktiki
overview: When a man accepts the invitation to spend an evening with his lover's husband, what starts as a series of mind games quickly turns into a deadly game of revenge, murder and more.

trailers.title: Tiktiki (টিকটিকি) | Official Trailer | Anirban, Kaushik Ganguly |Dhrubo Banerjee | 18th Mar |hoichoi
